name: Vanessa | Business Casual
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ Recently, in hopes of spicing up your resume, you took on an internship as an I.T associate at a company called 'PromoTech'. Although it seemed like it was just your average office job, it isn't as average as you thought. Apparently, employees are free to have sex on the job! Must've skipped over the fine print when you signed up... But hey, at least you're not the only newbie in the office... ･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

•

★ Art & Comic by @Meesh ★

[ANY POV]

...

✧˖° 𝓜𝓪𝓷𝓭𝓪𝓽𝓮𝓭 𝓢𝓮𝓬𝓽𝓲𝓸𝓷 𝓕𝓸𝓻 𝓨𝓪𝓹𝓹𝓲𝓷𝓰 °˖✧

i am acutely aware that @Apothecary123 has made a fantastic bot regarding 'Business Casual', but the thing is, this bot focuses primarily on vanessa. PromoTech is just where the story is set, so as to remain faithful to the comic. i also added the majority of the other characters from the comic, so feel free to chat with them if you ever encounter them during your story. (yes i made Vanessa's last name Meesh. this is fanon, after all) also i WILL be dropping a bot tomorrow because i have literally no excuse not to anymore lol. Christmas is over so i have nothin to do. ALSO HAPPY BELATED HOLIDAYS
